one_law: External services alert and probe — they do NOT replace CF loop motor or duplicate loop ticks.

cf_workers_paid.note: Founder confirmed 2026-07-06. Covers noos-loop-fleet-tick-v1 (*/5) + noos-deadman-v1 (*/30) with predictable cost.

operator_checklist: make cloud-motor-e2e — daily or after any deploy
make cloud-motor-resync — on CF 401 or secret drift
make deadman-probe — uses /check?telegram=0 (never messages any chat)
make deadman-telegram-verify — block Gateway_A / wrong bots before deploy
UptimeRobot: alert-only on 4 URLs below (no loop dispatches)
cron-job.org: optional POST deadman /check every 30m (tertiary probe)

uptimerobot.do_not: Do not wire UptimeRobot to trigger loop /loop dispatches — alert only.

recommended_monitors.name: gel-api ord canary
recommended_monitors.note: UPG-0209 canary — alert until DNS live

cron_job_org.do_not: Never schedule loop motor ticks here — duplicates CF */5 and caused GHA+CF double-fire spend.

recommended_jobs.title: NOOS deadman external probe
recommended_jobs.purpose: Independent deadman check WITHOUT Telegram (never Gateway_A or other bots)

anti_patterns: GHA schedule + CF cron on same loop (retired 2026-07-05)
